_meta.purpose: Hardcoded test students for v0.1. The login code is the key. These are PERSONAS (made-up), not real minors, so we can demo and test safely before COPPA/FERPA work. Add or edit students here; no code change needed. NOTE: JSON files cannot contain code comments or a trailing sentence without becoming invalid and breaking the app, so the required change-notes and closing statement live inside this _meta block instead of as comments.
_meta.change_notes: 2026-07-19  Initial version. Four personas with starting progress notes.
_meta.closing_statement: I did no harm and this file is not truncated.

1234.name: Alex
1234.progress: Brand new. Has not started solving linear equations yet. Says math makes them nervous.

2345.name: Maya
2345.progress: Comfortable with one-step equations like x + 4 = 9. Ready to try two-step equations such as 2x + 3 = 11.

3456.name: Sam
3456.progress: Can solve two-step equations. Working on equations with the variable on both sides, like 5x - 4 = 3x + 2.

0000.name: Demo Student
0000.progress: A neutral demo login for showing the tutor to other people. No strong prior history.
